title: Transactions, Isolation, Concurrency, and Recovery
description: Two operators reassign and resolve the same ticket while a failure occurs between related writes. Learners cumulatively produce a concurrency-safe ticket transition protocol through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Explain atomicity, consistency, isolation, and durability using a multi-statement business invariant.
Bound a unit of work with BEGIN, COMMIT, ROLLBACK, and savepoints and verify failure behavior.
Recognize dirty read, nonrepeatable read, phantom, lost update, and write-skew schedules.
